section.headline: Guiding with family values & integrity
section.description: Family-owned and operated since 2005, committed to excellence in every project across New York.

ceo.name: Adil Shamis
ceo.title: Owner • Mega Contracting NY Group
ceo.alt: Adil Shamis - Owner, Mega Contracting NY Group
quotes: Adil Shamis founded Mega Contracting NY Group in 2005 with a vision to provide quality construction services built on trust and integrity. As a family-owned business, Adil has personally overseen thousands of successful projects across New York, building a reputation for excellence and reliability.
description: With over two decades of experience in the construction industry, Adil brings extensive knowledge in general contracting, renovation, and commercial construction. His hands-on approach ensures every project meets the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship.
Adil is a proud member of the New York construction community and is committed to delivering exceptional service to families and businesses throughout the region.

testimonials.name: Michael Rosenberg
testimonials.text: Mega Contracting completely transformed our Upper West Side apartment. Adil and his team were professional, punctual, and the quality of work exceeded our expectations. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: As a first-time home renovator, I was nervous about the process. Mega Contracting made everything easy and transparent. They completed our brownstone renovation on time and on budget.

testimonials.name: David Goldstein
testimonials.text: We've used Mega Contracting for multiple commercial projects. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality is why we keep coming back. A truly reliable partner.

testimonials.name: Jennifer Walsh
testimonials.text: Our home addition turned out beautifully. The Mega Contracting team was respectful, clean, and communicated throughout the entire process. We couldn't be happier!

testimonials.name: Adil Shamis
testimonials.text: For over 20 years, our family has been proud to serve New York families and businesses. We treat every project like it's our own home. That's the Mega Contracting difference.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Expert answers to common questions about construction, renovation, and our services in New York.

items.question: What areas do you serve in New York?
items.answer: Mega Contracting NY Group proudly serves all five boroughs of New York City (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, and Staten Island), as well as Long Island, Westchester County, and surrounding areas throughout the New York metropolitan region.

items.question: How long does a kitchen renovation take?
items.answer: A typical kitchen renovation takes 4-8 weeks depending on the scope of work, materials selected, and any structural changes required. We provide a detailed timeline during your consultation and keep you informed throughout the process.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Yes, Mega Contracting NY Group is fully licensed and insured in the state of New York. We carry comprehensive liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage for your protection and peace of mind.

items.question: Do you handle commercial construction projects?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have extensive experience with commercial construction including office build-outs, retail spaces, restaurants, and multi-family buildings. Our team understands commercial codes, timelines, and the importance of minimizing business disruption.

items.question: Do you provide free estimates?
items.answer: Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all projects. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, take measurements, and provide a detailed written estimate within 24-48 hours.

items.question: What warranty do you offer?
items.answer: We stand behind our work with a comprehensive 10-year workmanship warranty. Additionally, all materials we install come with manufacturer warranties. Your satisfaction and peace of mind are our top priorities.

items.question: Can you help with design and permits?
items.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive design-build services. Our team can assist with design concepts, material selection, and handle all necessary permits and approvals required for your project in New York.

items.question: How do I get started with my project?
items.answer: Simply contact us to schedule a free consultation. We'll meet at your property to discuss your vision, budget, and timeline. From there, we'll provide a detailed proposal and guide you through every step of the process.

items.question: What types of commercial projects do you specialize in?
items.answer: We specialize in office build-outs, retail construction, restaurant renovations, medical facilities, and multi-family residential buildings. Each project receives personalized attention regardless of size or complexity.

items.question: Do you work with historic properties?
items.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience with historic renovations and restorations in New York. We understand landmark requirements and work carefully to preserve architectural character while updating systems and functionality.

knowledgeCard.title: Still have questions?
